details: Read 5 analyses: elu_analysis.md (ELU SFPU kernel pattern with _calculate_exponential_piecewise_), celu_analysis.md (CELU activation template pattern), prelu_sfpu_analysis.md (raw TTI instructions, conditionals), rrelu_analysis.md (not present - nuked), expm1_analysis.md (full compute API/LLK dispatch pattern). Key patterns: ELU is closest reference for SELU (exp-based negative branch). SELU is no-parameter from host perspective (fixed scale/alpha constants baked into kernel). Will use SFPU_UNARY_NO_PARAM_KERNEL_FN macro and SFPU_UNARY_KERNEL_INIT.

No-parameter kernel. Strategy: single v_if for negative branch computing alpha*(exp(x)-1), then unconditional scale multiply. Uses _calculate_exponential_piecewise_ and _init_exponential_ from ELU pattern. Constants alpha=0x3FD63840, scale=0x3F868640 via Converter::as_float.
New LLK dispatch file with SfpuType::selu. Uses custom init callback selu_init to set up exponential coefficients.
No-param tile functions selu_tile(idst) and selu_tile_init(). Uses SFPU_UNARY_NO_PARAM_KERNEL_FN and SFPU_INIT_KERNEL_CALL macros.
SELU already exists at line 128 of unary_op_types.hpp from previous batch nuke that preserved enum entries. No modification needed.
Added SELU to get_macro_definition() -> SFPU_OP_SELU_INCLUDE and get_op_init_and_func_default() -> selu_tile_init/selu_tile. No change to get_op_approx_mode (default false is correct).
SELU has no user-configurable parameters (scale and alpha are fixed constants in the kernel). No change to is_parametrized_type() needed.
Added REGISTER_UNARY_OPERATION(selu, SELU) macro. No-parameter operation.
Added bind_unary_operation for selu with no parameters. Uses unary_3param_wrapper wrapping ttnn::selu.
Added selu to name_to_golden_function dict using torch.nn.functional.selu, and added ttnn.selu to TTNN_ELTWISE_UNARY_CPP_FUNCTIONS list.
Fixed bind_unary_operation template parameter to use &ttnn::selu directly (not wrapped). The bind_unary_operation template internally uses unary_3param_wrapper.

All 11 layers implemented for SELU. 6 new files created, 6 existing files modified. SELU is a no-parameter operation with fixed constants (scale=1.0507, alpha=1.6733) baked into the SFPU kernel. The kernel uses a single v_if conditional for the negative branch with _calculate_exponential_piecewise_, then an unconditional scale multiply for all lanes.
